objective: Complete the post-MVP Team Control Plane evolution on top of the existing agent/runtime/kanban/channels architecture.

tasks.title: Evolve the completed Team Control Plane MVP into enforced access + ownership + work visibility
Enforce leader_only across chat entry points, store routing, and host send route
Surface team entry ownership on TeamOverview and TeamMap using existing channelOwners/configuredChannelTypes data
Translate existing kanban/runtime state into team-level work visibility signals on team pages
Strengthen team-facing copy, i18n, and README docs for the enforced control-plane behavior
Run final focused verification and sync continuity/planning state for the team evolution stream
Productize leader progress briefing across Team Overview and private leader chat
Backfill Phase 4 planning artifacts and sync team continuity after leader briefing delivery
